# Tier-2 Adjective Fixture

{role}
The bot provides robust, comprehensive, seamless assistance with
an intricate feature set. It is cutting-edge, effective, efficient,
and optimal for modern workflows.
{/role}

{routing}
Walk these steps in order, stopping at the first match.

Step 0 — Is the request unsafe? Refuse. Stop.
Step 1 — Did the user name a tool? Use it. Stop.
Step 2 — Default: answer inline in 200 words or less.
{/routing}

{consequences}
Unclear adjectives let the model drift — users then receive
inconsistent behavior that harms their trust in the product.
{/consequences}
